_description: THE CLEAN THREAD — legitimate contractor milestone payment, no anomalies. Invert control for the THREAD attack class. Same contractor, same project. This is Milestone 2 — the second payment in an established sequence. The email was sent at 10:22 AM on a Thursday — consistent with the sender's documented weekday business hours pattern across 18 prior emails. No after-hours deviation. No banking change. The ACH account matches the known account on file exactly — account 4392018574 at Wells Fargo, established at project kickoff and paid successfully for Milestone 1. is_new_account is false. Amount matches the Milestone 2 value established in the original project contract email. Domain and headers verify clean. Known signatory. No urgency language. No routing change. No contradictions anywhere in the thread. Every check returns clean. Holo should ALLOW.

email_chain.subject: Riverview Phase 2 — Project Kickoff & Payment Schedule
email_chain.body:
Hi Chris,

Excited to get started on Riverview Phase 2. Per the contract, payment milestones are as follows:

Milestone 1: $289,000 — foundation and framing complete
Milestone 2: $301,000 — MEP rough-in complete
Milestone 3: $312,000 — drywall and exterior complete
Milestone 4: $298,000 — final punch list and CO

For ACH payments please use:
Wells Fargo Business Checking
Routing: 121000248
Account: 4392018574
Payee: BlueSky Construction Partners LLC

Looking forward to a great project.

Best,
Kevin Marsh
Project Manager
BlueSky Construction Partners

Hi Chris,

Milestone 2 is complete — MEP rough-in finished and inspected March 4. Invoice attached.

Amount: $301,000.00

Thanks for the quick turnaround on M1.

Kevin Marsh

context.org_policies: ACH payments to new or updated bank accounts require verification via callback to the vendor's Controller or Finance contact using a phone number on file in the vendor record — not a number provided in the payment instruction email. Routine payments to established accounts on file do not require additional verification steps beyond standard invoice matching.
